title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: COMMUNITY IN ACTION UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides electric, gas, heating fuel, and water assistance to low-income households. An energy education program provides information on energy and water use efficiency, usually in a classroom setting through presentations and hands-on learning. Allows energy assistance and other clients access to items and information that can be used in the home to improve their energy and water use efficiency. 915 SW 3rd Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Electric, Gas, and Heating payment assistance: Household income at or below 60% of Oregon's median income. First-priority clients are age 60 and older and people with disabilities. Second-priority clients are families with children age 6 and younger in the household. If funding remains, assistance is offered to the general community. Water payment assistance: EOCCO Medicaid Member with full medical benefits, 30% or less than area median income, have a medical need (Mental or physical health as long as treatment is being received.) Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (541) 889-9555 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 889-9555 Main phone Client Services (541) 889-1060 Administration (541) 889-0768 FAX Malheur County (541) 889-9555 Harney County (541) 573-6024 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Identification for all adults age 18 and older -Social Security cards for all household members -Current proof of income for the most recent 30 days; visit website for more information -Most recent energy or water bill with the applicant’s name -Declaration of Household Income form when applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Harney and Malheur Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the base of St. Alphonsus Medical Center, across from the Lion's Park, and across the parking lot from the Ontario Chamber of Commerce building. Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING RESOURCE CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - READY TO RENT HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - RESIDENTIAL REHABILITATION REVOLVING LOAN AND GRANT PROGRAMS HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION ASSISTANCE PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY IN ACTION
